body_txt: Related to both The Three Faces of Eve and Four-Temperament Ensemble . Unrelated, however, to Four Is Death . Usually. This particular ensemble typically consists of: The admirable character might be The Smart Gal or the Cool Big Sis or the Team Mom . Otherwise, the mother figure will be doubled up with either the sweet-naive girl, the sexy girl or even the mannish one . This ensemble can typically be found in Schoolgirl Series . Compare Town Girls . See also Beauty, Brains, and Brawn . For the Spear Counterpart to this group, see Four-Man Band .
